name: Shrimp Creole for the Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1 teaspoon garlic salt or 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder may be substituted.
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in the crockpot.
2. Cook for 3 to 4 hours on high or 6 to 8 hours on low.
3. Add shrimp during the last hour of cooking.
4. Serve over hot rice.
5. Chicken, rabbit, or crawdads may be substituted for shrimp.
Stove top version:
1. Saute celery, onion, and bell peppers in oil or butter until tender (better if left a bit crunchy).
2. Add remaining ingredients except meat being used.
3. Simmer for at least 30 minutes to an hour.
4. Add shrimp or whatever meat you wish and simmer for another 30 minutes.
5. This dish is even better when reheated the next day.
